response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:12: Identified as an introduction segment by Tokoyami Towa. No music. 2. 01:13-04:45: Identified the song as '絆ノ奇跡' (Kizuna no Kiseki) based on on-screen text. Also identified the composer/lyricist as Jean-Ken Johnny. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for '絆ノ奇跡' by Jean-Ken Johnny in Japanese and found an English translation. 4. Constructed the JSON object with two scenes and the full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video shows a live performance segment featuring VTubers Tokoyami Towa and IRyS performing the song '絆ノ奇跡' (Kizuna no Kiseki). The video starts with a brief introduction by Tokoyami Towa, transitions into the song performance, and then concludes after the song ends.

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa introduces the upcoming song performance to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
Tokoyami Towa and IRyS perform '絆ノ奇跡' (Kizuna no Kiseki) on stage. On-screen text indicates the song title and credits the songwriter as Jean-Ken Johnny.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
闇夜を駆け抜けて 何処へむかう
月明かりだけがただ一つの道標
痛みも悲しみも拭いきれず
されどこの胸の炎は消させない
誰が為に僕たちは
この想いを貫いて
闇を裂き 陽の下で
光さす日まで
解き放たれた心に宿した火よ
舞い上げ、まとえ 今
夜明けの向こう側へ
君がいる この世界もう一度愛せるまで
我が命 果てようとも
繋いで行こう
絆が紡いで 生まれた奇跡を
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Racing through the dark night, where are we heading?
Only the moonlight is our only guidepost
Unable to wipe away the pain and sadness
Yet, I won't let the flame in this chest be extinguished
For whose sake are we
Carrying through with these feelings?
Tear through the darkness, under the sun
Until the day the light shines
Oh, the fire that dwells in the unleashed heart
Soar, wear it now
To the other side of the dawn
Until I can love the world you exist in once more
Even if my life meets its end
Let us continue to connect
The miracle born from the thread of bonds
